languages.text: "Знаю, решите: каждый так скажет, но я здесь по мелочи. "Несанкционированное касание освященного периметра?"… Ну а где мне было сесть, в воздухе? "Осквернение святыни"?… так я ж не нарочно их коптил. {n}Рубан вздыхает, будто снова мирится с приговором.{/n} И пускай. Иначе бы в {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} не попал — здоровье не то. В штрафном так не привередничают. Даст Бог-Император — не помру, не проявив себя".

traits.locale_text: "Знаю, решите: каждый так скажет, но я здесь по мелочи. "Несанкционированное касание освященного периметра?"… Ну а где мне было сесть, в воздухе? "Осквернение святыни"?… так я ж не нарочно их коптил. {n}Рубан вздыхает, будто снова мирится с приговором.{/n} И пускай. Иначе бы в {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} не попал — здоровье не то. В штрафном так не привередничают. Даст Бог-Император — не помру, не проявив себя".

languages.text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

languages.text: “我知道您肯定觉得谁都会这么说自己，但要不是因为那些鸡毛蒜皮的破事，我也不会在这儿。什么‘未经许可触碰圣化区域’？那我该坐哪儿，半空中吗？还有‘亵渎神殿’？我又不是故意把那儿熏得乌烟瘴气的。”{n}鲁班长叹一口气，仿佛又一次妥协于自己的判决。{/n}“不过算了，我也不是在抱怨。不然我哪有机会进{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}呢？我身体不好，但判罪军团不挑人。愿神皇庇佑，可别让我还没来得及证明自己就死了。”
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

languages.text: « Vous allez sûrement penser que tout le monde dit ça, mais c'est seulement à cause de chicaneries que je me retrouve ici. "Non-respect d'un périmètre consacré" ? Où est-ce que j'étais censé m'asseoir, dans les airs ? "Profanation d'un temple" ? C'est pas comme si j'avais fait exprès de fumer à cet endroit. » {n}Ruban pousse un long soupir, comme s'il se résignait une nouvelle fois à sa sentence.{/n} « Enfin, je me plains pas. J'aurais jamais pu intégrer l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} autrement, vu mon état de santé. Mais ils sont pas regardants, dans la Légion Pénale. Si l'Empereur-Dieu le veut, je resterai en vie assez longtemps pour prouver que je vaux quelque chose. »
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

Si l'Empereur-Dieu le veut, je resterai en vie assez longtemps pour prouver que je vaux quelque chose. »

languages.text: "Herkesin kendisi için aynı şeyi söylediğini düşüneceğinizi biliyorum ama o küçük kusur bulmalar olmasaydı burada olmazdım. 'Kutsal bir çevreye izinsiz dokunmak' mı? Nerede oturacaktım, havada mı? 'Tapınağa saygısızlık' mı? Bilerek mekânı dumana boğmadım ya." {n}Ruban, sanki cezasıyla bir kez daha yüzleşiyormuş gibi iç çekiyor.{/n} "Neyse, şikâyet etmiyorum. Başka türlü {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum'a{/g} nasıl girerdim? Sağlığım iyi değil. Ceza infaz lejyonunda seçici değiller. Tanrı İmparator izin verirse bir işe yaradığımı kanıtlamadan ölmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

Tanrı İmparator izin verirse bir işe yaradığımı kanıtlamadan ölmeyeceğim."

languages.text: «Sé que pensará que todo el mundo dirá lo mismo, pero, de no ser por una nadería resentida, no estaría aquí. ¿"Contacto no autorizado con un perímetro consagrado"? ¿Y dónde me sentaba si no, en el aire? ¿"Profanación de altar"? No llené aquello de humo a propósito». {n}Ruban suspira con pesadez, como si volviera a asimilar su sentencia.{/n} «En fin, tampoco me quejo. ¿Cómo habría entrado en el {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} si no? Mi salud no es buena, pero en las legiones penales no son tan exquisitos. Dios Emperador mediante, no moriré antes de demostrar mi valía».
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

No llené aquello de humo a propósito». {n}Ruban suspira con pesadez, como si volviera a asimilar su sentencia.{/n} «En fin, tampoco me quejo. ¿Cómo habría entrado en el {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} si no? Mi salud no es buena, pero en las legiones penales no son tan exquisitos. Dios Emperador mediante, no moriré antes de demostrar mi valía».

languages.text: "Ich weiß, Ihr denkt, das sagen sie alle, aber genau wegen dieser Korinthenkackerei bin ich hier. 'Unautorisierte Berührung einer geweihten Stätte'? Tja, wo hätte ich denn sitzen sollen? In der Luft? 'Entweihung eines Schreins'? Ich habe den Laden doch nicht absichtlich abgefackelt." {n}Ruban seufzt, als würde er sich einmal mehr mit seinem Urteil abfinden.{/n} "Egal, ich beschwere mich nicht. Wie sonst wäre ich in das {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} gekommen? Ich bin nicht bei guter Gesundheit. Aber in der Straflegion sind sie nicht wählerisch. So der Gottimperator will, sterbe ich nicht, ehe ich zeigen konnte, dass ich etwas wert bin."
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."

So der Gottimperator will, sterbe ich nicht, ehe ich zeigen konnte, dass ich etwas wert bin."

languages.text: 「みんなはそう言うだろうけど、俺はそうじゃない。小さなことばかり気にしなきゃ、ここに来なかっただろう。聖域に触れたって？どこに座るべきだったんだ、空中に？神聖な場所を汚したって？わざと煙草を吸ったわけじゃない。」{n}ルバンはため息をつき、まるで自分の判決を受け入れたかのように。{/n} 「とにかく、俺は文句は言わない。どうすれば{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタルム{/g}に入れたんだろう。健康は良くない。でも、軍刑務所は細かいことは気にしない。皇帝の御意志があれば、俺は何かを証明する前に死ぬだろう」
languages.original_text: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."
